app.name: Bitwarden Clients
app.one_liner: A unified suite of password management clients for web, desktop, browser extensions, and CLI, excluding mobile platforms.

screens.name: Security Settings
screens.purpose: Configure authentication, encryption, and account security options.

screens.name: Vault View
screens.purpose: Display and manage stored credentials and secure notes.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a new or updated secure item to the local vault and sync with server.

rust_commands.name: upgrade_kdf
rust_commands.purpose: Initiate background upgrade of Key Derivation Function settings for accounts below minimum security thresholds.

mvp_plan: week 1: Create basic vault screen with item listing
week 1: Implement core cryptography module for master password salt handling
week 1: Set up Nx monorepo structure with shared libs
acceptance_tests: Desktop application supports 'login with device' functionality without regression.
System prompts user to upgrade KDF settings if account uses outdated parameters.
User can view email-protected Sends in all client applications after v2026.2.1 upgrade.
